name: Industrial Empire
short_description: Build and expand your industrial empire. Invest in industries and companies, manage supply chains, and operate your forklift hands-on to handle inventory, shipments, and sales.
detailed_description:
Summary

Start with a small industry. Buy and sell products, request shipments from your industries and hands-on load/unload pallets. Fulfill orders and reinvest profits to expand your business. Scale your operation from a small trader to full-fledged industrial empire.

  • Purchase and upgrade industries to produce products.

  • Upgrade product production and price to maximize profit.

  • Manipulate market and control demand.

  • Purchase shares of rivals for passive income.

  • Find your own way to the top.

Hands-on Mechanics

Operate your forklift to manually load and unload pallets, move goods through your warehouse, and handle shipments yourself. Every decision matter: your hands-on actions impact your profits.

Dynamic Market

The market reacts to supply and demand. Buy low, sell high, and watch prices fluctuate based on your and rival companies' actions.

Growth and Progression

Upgrade your products and industries to increase efficiency and profit. Every upgrade opens new strategies and opportunities to dominate the market.

Replayability

Multiple paths to success: focus on trading, production, or a balanced approach. No two runs play exactly the same.

Challenge / Risk

Compete against AI rivals who will buy shares, manipulate markets, and expand their operations. Can you outsmart them and rise to the top?

Two Outcomes

Will you go bankrupt or own 100% of all of your rivals?
